title: AST Drive in Violation of Instructional Permit & Drive Without Insurance: Healy [AK25093665]
incident_type: Drive in Violation of Instructional Permit & Drive Without Insurance
summary: On 9/14/2025 at about 2006 hours, AST Parks Hwy Team conducted a traffic stop on a red 2001 Subaru Outback for speeding 79 MPH in a posted 55 MPH zone. title: AST SAR: Kodiak [AK25093388]
summary: On Sept. 13, 2025, Alaska State Troopers received a report around 7:45 p.m. that 30-year-old Andrew James Pillans of Kodiak was missing after he left his campsite on Long Island. title: AST Search and Rescue: skwentna [AK25093430]
summary: On the evening of 09/13/2025 AST, dispatch was notified of an overdue hunter in the Skwentna area. A 62-year-old male had failed to return to the cabin after splitting up with his hunting partner at 09:00 am. title: AST DUI: Fairbanks [AK25093484]
summary: On September 14th, 2025, Fairbanks AST Troopers conducted a traffic stop on a vehicle that was driving on College Rd in Fairbanks. the driver was identified as Daniel Bishop who was arrested and remanded to FCC for Fail To Yield, Resisting Arrest, and Reckless Driving.

title: AST DUI: FAIRBANKS [AK25093479]
summary: On September 14, 2025, at approximately 0344 hours, Alaska State Troopers conducted a traffic stop on a vehicle driving eastbound on College Rd with no headlights on. Upon contact the driver was identified as Kip Angaiak (24). Investigation determined Kip was driving under the influence. Kip was arrested and remanded to FCC for Driving Under the Influence.
